admin_database_description: Status and maintenance operations for the FHIR database.
admin_database_no_operations: No maintenance operations are available for the scopes granted to this session.
admin_database_rebuild_description: Rebuild the search index from the content already stored in the database.
admin_database_reset_description: Wipe the database store and reset the search index. This is a destructive operation.
admin_database_reset_dialog_message: This permanently deletes all FHIR resources and clears the search index. This action cannot be undone.
home_about: Ignis is a platform for experimenting with FHIR (Fast Healthcare Interoperability Resources). This project builds on Spark, an open-source FHIR server implementation.
operations_subtitle: Live progress for long-running server operations.
operations_console_status_dummy: Showing placeholder data — live wiring lands in a follow-up.
resources_capability_error: Could not load the FHIR server capability statement. Check that the FHIR API is reachable and try again.
resources_subtitle: Resource types declared by the FHIR server, with instance counts.
